source.name: Level 2: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - Action Class Structure
source.instructions: **Which two methods must every Rasa action class implement?**
source.learningObjectives: SWBAT identify required methods of an action class
source.guidance: Every action is a Python class that inherits from Action and must implement: (1) name() — returns the action name (e.g. 'action_bank_hours'), which must match what is registered in the domain; (2) run() — contains your custom logic and receives dispatcher, tracker, and domain. You send messages with dispatcher.utter_message() inside run().
